title: Contagion - A Zombie Infection Mod
description: Zombie Infection Mod - This Mod adds the functionality that Zombies are able to give you a deadly infection.
body:
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1027702?logo=curseforge&logoColor=black&label=&labelColor=orange&color=242424)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/contagion) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/contagion?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=black&label=&labelColor=18ED49&color=242424)](https://modrinth.com/mod/contagion) [![Supported Versions](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1027702(4F21AC).svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/contagion) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388544059114786907?style=flat&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=&labelColor=blue)](https://discord.gg/rSVp3nCpPx) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-75D5E3?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/D1D71EVQVC)

This **Zombie Infection Mod** adds the functionality that Zombies are able to give you a deadly infection.

**Please note:** with version 1.5.1 the Forge/NeoForge versions of the mod use two config files for server and client (old common config files are ignored).

When a Zombie hits you there is a chance that you get infected (default 80%). Armor will lower this chance by a value of up to 60 (with full Diamond/Netherite). If the infection timer runs out you die instantly.

![Infection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8458952484a4fc4aa70b3f021dea3d040c84950d.png)


Starting with version 1.5.0 a small display with the current protection value against infections was added (e.g. a value of 20% means, out of 10 times a Zombie hits you 8 hits will most likely infect you). The protection value display can be enabled/disabled and moved in the settings on the client config page.
![HUD (protection display)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84a0d500c7e2b6c6acf26e36097d409174d9e830_0.webp)


Killing a Zombie has a 7.5% chance that Contagious Flesh gets droped. The Looting enchantment adds 2.5% per level.

![Contagious Flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f72cbdbcc158a30de009ca721a0c4e885afa16a.png)



Heating up the Contagious Flesh will give you **Heated Zombie Flesh**, which is not contagious anymore. 
![Cooking Contagious Flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b9f389ff1ba54e76c0a57346cdc32d4eddf882b.png)



When you combine the Heated Zombie Flesh with Gold Ingots you get **Gold Streaked Zombie Flesh**. Eating the gold streaked flesh resets the infection timer, but it does not cure you. 

![Gold Streaked Zombie Flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf574c2426ef64e6b4479efb7e62a39d6725d99d.png)



In the last step you brew yourself **The Cure**, combining the Gold Streaked Flesh with an awkward potion.
![Brew the cure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e28923592e37fdcd4a17ed0b41927287d87ae84.png)



You can extend the duration of the cure potion with Redstone and turn it into a Cure Potion II lasting 3x as long.
![Cure Potion II](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9dc9df46cd3cbcda2ff47ca6d8a7cd0023ab44e.png)


Configuration Options:
![Main config page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c06d6eb13a83eea92555a7dc9b3dbb45f538f72_0.webp)

![Client config page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0cf95b90b8368afb28f746bcac3f4a3bb6e4744_0.webp)
